subject: Thank you for contacting us
snippet: Dear Customer, Thank you for contacting Apple. We have reviewed your email and your query is related to technical support or queries for your Apple product. Hence, please contact the customer support number on 000800 100 9009 (Toll-Free) available from Monday to Friday between 09:00-18:00 IST. Alternatively, please click on the link https://getsupport.apple.com for a chat or call back by Technical Advisor. You may also browse frequently asked questions, download software updates, and participate

subject: Your iCloud storage is full
snippet: Hello Suraj Satyarthi, Your iCloud storage is full. You have exceeded your storage plan. This means that your documents, contacts and device data are no longer being backed up to iCloud and your photos and videos are not being uploaded to iCloud Photos. iCloud Drive and iCloud-enabled apps will no longer be updated across your devices. To continue using these iCloud services, you need to upgrade your iCloud storage plan: https://setup.icloud.com/email/prefs/storage?path=STORAGE_AND_BACKUP/CHANGE

subject: You have run out of iCloud storage.
snippet: Hello Suraj, You have used up all of your 5 GB of free iCloud storage. All the photos, videos and documents that are currently in iCloud will still be stored safely, but any new ones will not be saved to there. To avoid this, upgrade to 50 GB : https://setup.icloud.com/email/prefs/storage?path=STORAGE_AND_BACKUP/CHANGE_STORAGE_PLAN. Alternatively, you can reduce the amount of storage : https://setup.icloud.com/email/prefs/storage?path=STORAGE_AND_BACKUP/MANAGE_STORAGE you are using. Sincerely, T
